note: Performance ratchet baselines. Gates fail when current > baseline * (1 + tolerancePct/100). When a fix lands that meaningfully lowers a metric, lower its baseline in the same PR to lock the win in. Bundle baselines ratcheted 2026-07-05 (three waves): B6 lazy-loaded the experimental graph view (react-force-graph-2d + d3 out of entry): entry 4618 → 4223 KB. C1/C6 React.lazy'd the 5 heavy node bodies, evicting @tiptap/starter-kit + extension pack + lowlight + tiptap-markdown: 4223 → 3219 KB raw / 928 → 706 KB gzip. C2/C3/C7/chain-B lazied WorkspaceTerminalDock (@xterm/xterm), ChatPage+ChatPanel (highlight.js + markdown-it + chat tree), @module-federation/runtime, and noteSearchExtension (@tiptap/react + @tiptap/pm): 3219 → 1329 KB raw / 706 → 270 KB gzip — under the ≤1500 KB C-dimension target. B2-M image preview selection added a deliberate 1 KB gzip budget (270 → 271) in exchange for reducing the 10×4K decoded-pixel estimate from 457.8 MB to 26.4 MB (17.4×); the raw entry remains under the 1,500 KB target. Remaining entry is react/react-dom + app code + i18n messages (C8 candidate).
runtimeNote: Counter gates for perf:scenarios (deterministic, node-count independent). typing.nodes-array-replace ratcheted 132 → 10 after B1 fixed I-1 (200ms editor writeback debounce): measured 3 replacements for 120 keys (was 121), frames>20ms 43% → 1.2%, INP p95 48 → 32ms. drag.nodes-array-replace ratcheted 100 → 10 after B7 (2026-07-05): useNodeDrag no longer calls moveNode/moveNodes on every pointer-move — the gesture renders from an ephemeral `dragOffset` applied in getNodeWrapperStyle (CanvasNodeView's memo comparator gates re-render to only the dragged node(s)), and commits the real nodes array exactly once on drag end. Measured 2 replacements for 3×90 pointer-moves (was 91 for 90 moves, ~1:1). Verified visually via a real CDP-driven drag (mid-drag transform matches the committed post-drop transform exactly — no snap-back). resize counter gates were added after the A2 resize fix (2026-07-10): the scenario drives 90 pointer-moves; movement updates only ephemeral `resizePreview` geometry, and gesture end commits the canonical nodes array once. Across 3×90 moves the per-run raw counters were nodes-array-replace [1,1,1] and canvas-save-ipc [2,1,1], so gate maxima are 1 and 2; frames>20ms median was 0%. chat-stream replays 521 deterministic text deltas: a 32ms visual batch reduced whole-message Markdown renders from 374 to 64 (82.9%); the ≤80 gate preserves headroom without making display refresh rate part of the result. Timing metrics (INP/frames/LoAF) stay informational — per-machine.
